title: Routes logs behavior lane precheck
delta_summary: runtime selection hardened to support both colony_runtime and graph_runtime
node logs route includes backward-compatible graph-scoped endpoint plus colony-scoped endpoint

risk_signals.evidence: upstream variant lacks graph-scoped node logs route used by existing Web UI/tests
risk_signals.impact: potential 404/regression for existing frontend and API consumers
log route can fail in sessions running on graph_runtime shape

decision_gate: prefer keep_local if compatibility/runtime-hardening benefits are confirmed by tests
